description: Prompt design patterns: system prompts, few-shot, chain-of-thought, output formatting, injection defense, and temperature effects
source: OpenAI prompt engineering guide, Anthropic prompt design docs, prompt injection literature (Perez & Ribeiro 2022, Greshake et al. 2023)

triples.subject: prompt
triples.object: input text that instructs an LLM on what to generate

triples.subject: prompt engineering
triples.object: designing inputs to elicit desired LLM behavior

triples.subject: system prompt
triples.object: persistent behavioral context for entire conversation

triples.subject: system prompt
triples.object: user and assistant messages

triples.subject: system prompt
triples.object: model persona, constraints, and output format

triples.subject: system prompt
triples.object: secrets (user can extract via prompt injection)

triples.subject: user message
triples.object: specific task or question for the model

triples.subject: assistant message
triples.object: model's prior responses in conversation history

triples.subject: few-shot prompting
triples.object: example input-output pairs before the actual query

triples.subject: few-shot prompting
triples.object: desired format and reasoning pattern by demonstration

triples.subject: few-shot prompting
triples.object: zero-shot for complex or formatted tasks

triples.subject: zero-shot prompting
triples.object: only instructions without examples

triples.subject: zero-shot prompting
triples.object: model's pretraining knowledge and instruction tuning

triples.subject: one-shot prompting
triples.object: single example before the query

triples.subject: chain-of-thought prompting
triples.object: model to show reasoning steps before final answer

triples.subject: chain-of-thought prompting
triples.object: accuracy on arithmetic, logic, and multi-step problems

triples.subject: chain-of-thought prompting
triples.object: Wei et al. (2022)

triples.subject: chain-of-thought prompting
triples.object: "Let's think step by step" (zero-shot CoT)

triples.subject: zero-shot CoT
triples.object: Kojima et al. (2022)

triples.subject: self-consistency
triples.object: multiple CoT paths and takes majority vote on answer

triples.subject: self-consistency
triples.object: single chain-of-thought by reducing variance

triples.subject: role prompting
triples.object: specific expertise or persona to the model

triples.subject: role prompting
triples.object: "You are an expert Python developer" to bias toward code quality

triples.subject: role prompting
triples.object: vocabulary, depth, and style of response

triples.subject: output formatting
triples.object: model response to specific structure (JSON, XML, markdown)

triples.subject: output formatting
triples.object: explicit format instructions plus example output

triples.subject: JSON mode
triples.object: model to output valid JSON

triples.subject: JSON mode
triples.object: schema description in prompt for reliable field names

triples.subject: structured output
triples.object: programmatic parsing of model responses

triples.subject: structured output
triples.object: post-processing failures from malformed responses

triples.subject: temperature
triples.object: randomness of token sampling

triples.subject: temperature=0
triples.object: most deterministic (greedy) output

triples.subject: high temperature
triples.object: diversity and creativity of output

triples.subject: high temperature
triples.object: incoherent or off-topic generation

triples.subject: temperature
triples.object: logits before softmax conversion to probabilities

triples.subject: top_p (nucleus sampling)
triples.object: smallest set of tokens whose cumulative probability exceeds p

triples.subject: top_p
triples.object: temperature for controlling output diversity

triples.subject: context window
triples.object: number of tokens model can process in single call

triples.subject: context window overflow
triples.object: truncation of earliest messages in conversation

triples.subject: context window management
triples.object: summarization of prior conversation

triples.subject: context window management
triples.object: RAG to fetch relevant context on demand

triples.subject: context window management
triples.object: sliding window with most recent messages

triples.subject: lost in the middle
triples.object: model attending less to information in middle of long context

triples.subject: lost in the middle
triples.object: place important information at start or end of prompt

triples.subject: prompt injection
triples.object: user input overrides system prompt instructions

triples.object: SQL injection (untrusted input mixed with instructions)

triples.object: adversarial instructions in user message

triples.subject: indirect prompt injection
triples.object: adversarial instructions in retrieved content (documents, web pages)

triples.subject: indirect prompt injection
triples.object: Greshake et al. (2023)

triples.subject: indirect prompt injection
triples.object: RAG systems and agentic tool use

triples.subject: prompt injection defense
triples.object: input/output filtering

triples.subject: prompt injection defense
triples.object: delimiter-based instruction separation

triples.subject: prompt injection defense
triples.object: secondary LLM as judge to detect injection attempts

triples.subject: prompt injection defense
triples.object: principle of least privilege for tool access

triples.subject: jailbreaking
triples.object: bypass model safety training and content policies

triples.subject: jailbreaking
triples.object: prompt injection (injection hijacks task; jailbreak removes guardrails)

triples.subject: DAN prompt
triples.object: jailbreak technique using role-play

triples.subject: many-shot jailbreak
triples.object: many examples of unsafe Q&A pairs to override safety training

triples.object: in-context learning overriding RLHF alignment

triples.subject: prompt leaking
triples.object: system prompt contents via adversarial queries

triples.subject: prompt leaking
triples.object: not storing secrets in system prompt

triples.subject: instruction hierarchy
triples.object: system prompt over user message over retrieved content

triples.subject: instruction hierarchy
triples.object: effectiveness of injection from lower-priority sources

triples.subject: delimiters
triples.object: instructions from user-provided data

triples.subject: delimiters
triples.object: triple backticks, XML tags, or special tokens

triples.object: clear structural separation of prompt components

triples.subject: prompt chaining
triples.object: complex task into sequential LLM calls

triples.object: output of one call as input to the next

triples.subject: prompt chaining
triples.object: each step to be simpler and more reliable

triples.subject: meta-prompting
triples.object: LLM to generate or refine prompts for another LLM call

triples.object: prompt text to improve task performance

triples.object: evaluation set to measure improvement objectively

triples.object: positive instructions for desired behavior

triples.object: model to use only provided context for answers

triples.object: model generates plausible but factually incorrect content

triples.object: grounding, RAG, lower temperature, and verification prompts

triples.subject: citation prompting
triples.object: model to quote exact source text supporting each claim

triples.object: verification of generated claims against source material

triples.subject: prefill technique
triples.object: assistant response with partial content to constrain format

triples.object: starting assistant message with '{' to force JSON output

triples.object: model to reason internally before generating visible response

triples.object: complex reasoning by giving model scratch space

triples.object: length of model's generated response

triples.object: expected response length plus safety margin

triples.object: generation when specified string appears
